title: andropogon × taiwanensis
intro: Andropogon × taiwanensis is a sterile hybrid plant species belonging to the Poaceae family, resulting from the cross between Andropogon glomeratus and Andropogon taishunensis. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon × taiwanensis are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
